	)

			INSERT INTO @T_SPLIT VALUES (@i, @tempVar)

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_AutoReg]
	-- Add the parameters for the stored procedure here
@account varchar(14)
AS
BEGIN
set nocount on
declare @ssn char(13)
set @ssn=  (select  ISNULL(max(gameAccountNo),0) from AccountAuth) + 1
INSERT AccountAuth (gameAccountNo, gameAccount, password, cryptographTypeCode, legalBirthday, genderCode, authLimitTypeBitSet)
VALUES (@ssn, @account, CONVERT(binary(16),0x00000000000000000000000000000000), 3, 0, 0, 1)
INSERT AccountETC (gameAccountNo, banServerBitSet, accountCreateDate)
VALUES (@ssn, CONVERT(binary(16),0), '1999-01-01')
set nocount off
END

*/

CREATE  PROCEDURE [dbo].[ap_SLog] 
  @uid			INT				-- 霸烙拌沥锅龋
, @lastlogin	DATETIME		-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢矫埃
, @lastlogout	DATETIME		-- 付瘤阜肺弊酒眶矫埃
, @LastGame		INT				-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄霸烙
, @LastWorld	TINYINT			-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄霸烙辑滚
, @LastIP		VARCHAR(15)		-- 付瘤阜肺弊牢茄IP
AS

DECLARE @hardware varchar(16)

UPDATE	AccountETC
SET	lastLoginDate = @lastlogin,
		lastLogoutDate = @lastlogout,
		lastLoginGameServerNo = @LastWorld
WHERE	gameAccountNo = @uid

SELECT @hardware = hardware FROM AccountETC WHERE gameAccountNo = @uid

CREATE procedure [dbo].[write_gameuser_counts]
as

declare @gamename  nvarchar(50)
declare @cnt int
declare @txt nvarchar(500)
set @gamename ='AION'
set @txt = 'OK|'

set @cnt = (  
--扁粮 select top 1 concurrentUserCount from AionAccountDB..ConcurrentUserStat (nolock)
--扁粮 where serverNo=0 and concurrentUserStatTypeCode=2 order by registerDate desc
	
	-- 抛胶飘辑滚客 夯辑滚 牢刘阑 盒府窍搁辑 笛促甫 荐侩且荐 乐绰 备炼肺 函版窃
	-- 2009.04.30 by compleus
	select sum(concurrentUserCount)
	from dbo.ConcurrentUserStat
	where serverNo=0 and concurrentUserStatTypeCode=2 
	and registerdate > Dateadd(minute, -5, Getdate()) /* 5盒 */
	group by serverNo 
)
set @txt  = @txt + @gamename+'='+cast( @cnt as nvarchar(10) )+'; '

DECLARE @FS int, @OLEResult int, @FileID int

EXECUTE @OLEResult = sp_OACreate 'Scripti

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetOldestCreateDate]
	@accountId int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Insert statements for procedure here
	SELECT ISNULL(min(create_date), 0)
	FROM global_user_data with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE account_id = @accountId 

END

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_AccountCacheDA_SrchHiddenFatigueList]
	@world_id			int,
	@last_login_date	varchar(24)
AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	a.account_id, hidden_fatigue_point, hidden_fatigue_updatetime, hidden_fatigue_npckill, u.last_login_time, u.char_id, u.server_id
	FROM	account_data a (nolock)
	JOIN
	(
		SELECT	account_id, char_id, last_login_time, server_id, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by account_id order by last_login_time desc) as LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM
		FROM	global_user_data (nolock)
		WHERE	server_id = @world_id
		AND		last_login_time >= CONVERT(datetime, @last_login_date)
	) u ON a.account_id = u.account_id AND u.LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM = 1
	ORDER BY account_id DESC

error: 错误:  操作符不存在: timestamp without time zone >= bytea | LINE 1: ...WHERE server_id = p_world_id AND  last_login_time >= binary(... |                                                              ^ | HINT:  没有匹配指定名称和参数类型的操作符. 您也许需要增加明确的类型转换. | QUERY:  SELECT	a.account_id, hidden_fatigue_point, hidden_fati

CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_AccountCacheDA_SrchHiddenFatigueListForExcel]
	@world_id			int,
	@last_login_date	varchar(24)
AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	a.account_id, hidden_fatigue_point, hidden_fatigue_updatetime, hidden_fatigue_npckill, u.last_login_time, u.char_id, u.server_id
	FROM	account_data a (nolock)
	JOIN
	(
		SELECT	account_id, char_id, last_login_time, server_id, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by account_id order by last_login_time desc) as LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM
		FROM	global_user_data (nolock)
		WHERE	server_id = @world_id
		AND		last_login_time >= CONVERT(datetime, @last_login_date)
	) u ON a.account_id = u.account_id AND u.LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM = 1
	ORDER BY account_id DESC

create PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_AddCompound]
			@char_id		int
		,	@item_id		bigint -- sub_id
		,	@main_item_dbid bigint
		AS
		SET NOCOUNT ON
		
		begin tran	
		
		-- 주무기가 보조무기로 들어갈 경우 체크 : 현재 합성 주무기가 보조무기로 사용중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where id = @main_item_dbid and main_item_dbid != 0 and char_id = @char_id)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 1
		end		
		
		-- 주무기가 보조무기로 들어갈 경우 체크 : 주무기가 다른 아이템의 보조무기로 사용중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where main_item_dbid = @main_item_dbid and warehouse != 10 and char_id = @char_id)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 2
		end
		
		-- 보조무기가 다른 아이템의 보조무기로 사용 중인지
		if EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where main_item_dbid = @item_id and warehouse != 10 and char_id = @char_id)

error: 错误:  关系 "user_item" 不存在 | LINE 1: SELECT main_item_dbid                       FROM user_item w... |                                                          ^ | QUERY:  SELECT main_item_dbid                       FROM user_item where id = p_item_id and char_id = p_char_id | CONTEXT:  在SQL语句的第7行的PL/p
original_tsql_preview:
create PROCEDURE [dbo].[GM_UserItemDAO_DelCompoundRecovery]
			@char_id		int
		,	@item_id			bigint
		, @warehouse int
		AS
		SET NOCOUNT ON
		declare @main_item_dbid bigint

		begin tran

		select @main_item_dbid = main_item_dbid from user_item(updlock) where id = @item_id and char_id = @char_id
		if (@@rowcount = 0)
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 1
		end

		if not EXISTS (select id from user_item(UPDLOCK) where warehouse=16 and main_item_dbid=@main_item_dbid)
		begin	
			update user_item set warehouse = @warehouse where warehouse=17 and id = @item_id and char_id = @char_id
		end
		else
		begin
			rollback tran
			return 2
		end

		commit tran
		return 0

create proc [dbo].[TblAdminUserHistoryDA_SrchHistory]
			@admin_id nvarchar(10)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			SELECT top 50 T1.LOGIN_NM, T2.*, (SELECT LOGIN_NM FROM TBL_ADMIN_USER T3 WHERE T3.ADMIN_ID=T2.BY_ADMIN_ID) BY_LOGIN_NM
			FROM TBL_ADMIN_USER T1, TBL_ADMIN_USER_HISTORY T2
			WHERE T1.ADMIN_ID = T2.ADMIN_ID
			AND (T2.ADMIN_ID=@admin_id OR T2.BY_ADMIN_ID=@admin_id)
			order by t2.regdate desc
			
			set nocount off
			return

			@notice_status char(1)

			set nocount on

			set ansi_warnings off

			and t1.period_hour = @period_hour

			and (t1.communication_cd = @communication_cd OR t1.communication_cd = 'TRA')
			and t1.notice_status = @notice_status
			and convert(nvarchar, t2.regdate, 112) = @cur_yyyymmdd

			@cycle_min nvarchar(5),
			@max_min nvarchar(5)

			and DATEDIFF(minute, t1.gathering_date, t1.end_date) <= ''+@cycle_min+''

			@cur_date nvarchar(30),
			@pub_status nvarchar(10)			
		as
			set nocount on

CREATE proc [dbo].[TblStatisticsScheduleDA_SrchReservedSchedule]
			@current_time nvarchar(30),			
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),			
			@statistics_status char(1)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off			
			
			select *
			from TBL_STATISTICS_SCHEDULE(nolock)
			where ((STATISTICS_TO >= @current_time and STATISTICS_FROM <= @current_time and PERIOD_HOUR = @period_hour AND PERIOD_MIN = @period_min) or (STATISTICS_TO >= @current_time and STATISTICS_FROM <= @current_time and statistics_repeat_min != 0) or (statistics_period = 'ONCE' and task_cd = 'BEF'))						
			AND statistics_status = @statistics_status
			and task_cd != 'TRA'
			order by regdate ASC

			set nocount off
			return

create proc [dbo].[TblStatisticsScheduleDA_SrchTransHistory]		
			@statistics_id nvarchar(30),				
			@cur_yyyymmdd nvarchar(8),
			@period_hour nvarchar(2),
			@period_min nvarchar(2),		
			@task_cd nvarchar(30),
			@statistics_status char(1)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			select count(*) sendable
			from TBL_STATISTICS_SCHEDULE t1, TBL_STATISTICS_HISTORY t2
			where t1.statistics_id = t2.statistics_id
			and t1.statistics_id = @statistics_id
			and t1.period_hour = @period_hour
			and t1.period_min = @period_min
			and (t1.task_cd = @task_cd OR t1.task_cd = 'TRA')
			and t1.statistics_status = @statistics_status
			and convert(nvarchar, t2.regdate, 112) = @cur_yyyymmdd

			set nocount

create proc [dbo].[TblWorldInfoDA_SrchGameFTWorlds]
			@from_world_id nvarchar(3),
			@to_world_id nvarchar(3)
		as
			set nocount on
			set transaction isolation level read uncommitted
			set ansi_warnings off
			
			select T1.WORLD_ID, T1.WORLD_NM, T1.WORLD_DESC, T1.WORLD_STATUS,
				T2.DARK_USERS AS TOTAL_CON_USERS, T2.PC_STORE_LIGHT_USERS AS LIGHT_CHAR_COUNT, T2.PC_STORE_DARK_USERS AS DARK_CHAR_COUNT
			from tbl_world_info t1(nolock), TBL_GAME_WORLD_INFO t2(nolock)
			where t1.world_id=t2.world_id
			and t2.zone_id=0
			and t1.world_status='Y'
			and t1.world_id between @from_world_id and @to_world_id
			order by t1.world_id asc
						
			set nocount off
			return
